raw_text: very disgusting experience...I have ordered almost more 30 times but instead of any coupon code or any other advantages all I got is increase in handling charge , literally charging ₹9 for handling and ₹20 for small cart and ₹30 for delivery charges
My experience is pleasant due to its convenient and quick service, no matter what the weather is. Staff is also adhere to complaints if any.

The products from your store are of very good quality, and your service is excellent. Everything was delivered on time. Even the orders I placed arrived exactly as promised. I'm very satisfied with your service. Keep up the good work!
blink it a biggest fraud ever , I recieved unsealed product , and when I asked to take it return , they refused and said I unsealed it ,when I shown proof ,they said that product is non-returnable!

the vegetables are usually stale like cherry tomatoes/ grapes etc. , if asked in more than 1or 2 boxes , whenever the boxes are more like 5-6 , instead of less , I.e. 1-2 , the vegetables always stale & half rotten ..

Earlier i was disappointed in morning but by Evening around 8 pm onwards i am greatful to order as per my wishlist. Kudos to Blinkit. Now waiting for the items that I have ordered then will edit my posted review.
it's a really nice app 👍 but sometimes the damaged or different products arrive 😕 but it's overall one of the beat apps definitely worth buying stuff for here .
Quickest service when really needed, but the products are sometimes costly then the other platforms so thats make it difficult to order items
Everything is Good But Need Cancel Order Feature Because Sometime, I order by mistakes and wrong items so, please Blinkit Do Something about it.

Very disappointing experience with Blinkit. I received a damaged product and shared clear photos and videos as proof. Despite this, my complaint was rejected without a proper investigation. It feels like customer concerns are not taken seriously. Instead of providing a fair resolution, I received a generic response saying the issue could not be verified. I expected much better customer service. I cannot recommend this app based on my experience
Have been using since it was released. Do not buy vegetables & fruits. The price is 2-3 times the price of real time markets. Avg delivery time is max 20-25mins.
In case of all of my recent orders, I experienced that delivery took unusual long period of more than 15/20 minutes on average, whereas the warehouse is located near to my location
Best app for ordering groceries and other items. Order is quickly delivered and in proper paper bags. Keep it up BlinkIt ! 👍🏻❤️
Always showing surgery charge. I've been waiting for more than 6 hours for the surcharge to get removed, but it doesn't

Very impressive customer care service with no staff and no care about the customer just forcing customer to take the orders even if not required. This was myast over from blinkit I think their competitor may be much better with the issues resolution. Even telling around 1 hour to cancel the order due to internet glirch they did not cancelled the order nor their customer agents replied. If this is the scenario please shut down your operations. Good Bye blinkit
at first blinkit was a game changer But now it has changed. First of all many times it is unavailable and sometimes there is surge which is crazy

after update blinkit is not working on my phone it crashed after I opened then again same thing happened,I reinstall for second thought but didn't work,I am using Android 7 on redmi phone,same problem with my family phone who have same android 7
it's great but it would have been much better if there was an option for us to add more items 2-3 after placing the order in case we forgot.

Nowadays all small delivery bags come unsealed, allowing the delivery agents to see and handle whatever we order. Blinkit should make it a policy to at least seal it with adhesive tapes at the store so the privacy of the contents is maintained.

few days ago I ordered some ramen and stuff but due to very heavy rainfall I think that they will reject my order but instead the delivery boy took a whole diff way to reach and gave me my order and he was fully wet and unable to reach but still he give his best and talk to me politely
